compose_config.stdout:
name: compose
services:
  alfred:
    build:
      context: /home/dev/OH_SHOP
      dockerfile: compose/alfred/Dockerfile
    container_name: garage-alfred
    depends_on:
      ledger:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    environment:
      GARAGE_WORKSPACE_ROOT: /workspace
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - python
        - -c
        - import urllib.request; r=urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:3031/healthz', timeout=3); raise SystemExit(0 if r.status == 200 else 1)
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s
    image: oh-shop/alfred:0.1.0
    networks:
      garage-internal: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        host_ip: 127.0.0.1
        target: 3031
        published: "3031"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/services/alfred
        target: /workspace/services/alfred
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/roles/alfred
        target: /workspace/roles/alfred
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/ledger
        target: /workspace/ledger
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/projects
        target: /workspace/projects
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/jobs
        target: /workspace/jobs
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/shared
        target: /workspace/shared
        bind: {}
  chat-guard:
    command:
      - sh
      - -lc
      - python3 -c 'import docker' >/dev/null 2>&1 || pip install --no-cache-dir docker >/dev/null && python3 -u /opt/oh_shop/ops/manual/chat_guard.py --db /.openhands/openhands.db --watch --interval 60 --openhands-url http://openhands:3000
    container_name: openhands-chat-guard
    depends_on:
      openhands:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    image: python:3.11-alpine
    networks:
      garage-internal: null
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/data/openhands
        target: /.openhands
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/ops
        target: /opt/oh_shop/ops
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /var/run/docker.sock
        target: /var/run/docker.sock
        bind: {}
  ledger:
    build:
      context: /home/dev/OH_SHOP
      dockerfile: compose/ledger/Dockerfile
    container_name: garage-ledger
    environment:
      GARAGE_WORKSPACE_ROOT: /workspace
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - python
        - -c
        - import urllib.request; r=urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:3032/healthz', timeout=3); raise SystemExit(0 if r.status == 200 else 1)
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s
    image: oh-shop/ledger:0.1.0
    networks:
      garage-internal: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        host_ip: 127.0.0.1
        target: 3032
        published: "3032"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/ledger
        target: /workspace/ledger
        bind: {}
  open-webui:
    container_name: open-webui
    environment:
      ENABLE_OPENAI_API: "true"
      OLLAMA_BASE_URLS: ""
      OPENAI_API_BASE_URLS: http://host.docker.internal:1234/v1
      OPENAI_API_KEYS: lm-studio
    extra_hosts:
      - host.docker.internal=host-gateway
    image: ghcr.io/open-webui/open-webui:main@sha256:bb3f0281554bf05a9d505ffb5a5f067ab53e13ac772eb4ea3077a92ddc64600e
    networks:
      garage-internal: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        host_ip: 127.0.0.1
        target: 8080
        published: "3001"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: openwebui_data
        target: /app/backend/data
        volume: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/services/openwebui
        target: /workspace/services/openwebui
        bind: {}
  openhands:
    build:
      context: /home/dev/OH_SHOP
      dockerfile: compose/openhands_override/Dockerfile
    command:
      - uvicorn
      - openhands.server.listen:app
      - --host
      - 0.0.0.0
      - --port
      - "3000"
    container_name: openhands-app
    environment:
      AGENT_SERVER_IMAGE_REPOSITORY: oh-shop/agent-server
      AGENT_SERVER_IMAGE_TAG: 1.11.4-runtime-patched
      LOG_ALL_EVENTS: "true"
      OH_PERSISTENCE_DIR: /.openhands
      WORKSPACE_MOUNT_PATH: /opt/workspace_base
    extra_hosts:
      - host.docker.internal=host-gateway
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - python
        - -c
        - import urllib.request; r=urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:3000/', timeout=3); raise SystemExit(0 if r.status == 200 else 1)
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 20s
    image: oh-shop/openhands:1.5.0-runtime-patched
    networks:
      garage-internal: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        host_ip: 127.0.0.1
        target: 3000
        published: "3000"
        protocol: tcp
      - mode: ingress
        host_ip: 172.17.0.1
        target: 3000
        published: "3000"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    stdin_open: true
    tty: true
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /var/run/docker.sock
        target: /var/run/docker.sock
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/data/openhands
        target: /.openhands
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/services/openhands
        target: /workspace/services/openhands
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/roles/jarvis
        target: /workspace/roles/jarvis
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/projects
        target: /opt/workspace_base/projects
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/jobs
        target: /opt/workspace_base/jobs
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/shared
        target: /opt/workspace_base/shared
        bind: {}
  stagehand-mcp:
    build:
      context: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/vendor/stagehand_mcp
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    container_name: stagehand-mcp
    environment:
      BROWSER_HEIGHT: "1080"
      BROWSER_WIDTH: "1920"
      CHROME_PATH: /usr/bin/chromium
      DEVTOOLS: "false"
      EXPERIMENTAL: "true"
      HEADLESS: "true"
      MCP_HOST: 0.0.0.0
      MCP_PORT: "3020"
      STAGEHAND_LLM_API_KEY: lm-studio
      STAGEHAND_LLM_BASE_URL: http://host.docker.internal:1234/v1
      STAGEHAND_MODEL: ""
    extra_hosts:
      - host.docker.internal=host-gateway
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - node
        - -e
        - fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3020/healthz').then(r=>{if(!r.ok)throw 1}).catch(()=>process.exit(1))
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 15s
    image: oh-stagehand-mcp:0.3.0-runtime-patched
    networks:
      garage-internal: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        host_ip: 127.0.0.1
        target: 3020
        published: "3020"
        protocol: tcp
      - mode: ingress
        host_ip: 172.17.0.1
        target: 3020
        published: "3020"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/services/stagehand
        target: /workspace/services/stagehand
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/roles/robin
        target: /workspace/roles/robin
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/shared/download_staging
        target: /data/downloads
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/shared/evidence_staging
        target: /workspace/shared/evidence_staging
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/shared/handoff_staging
        target: /workspace/shared/handoff_staging
        bind: {}
  transfer:
    build:
      context: /home/dev/OH_SHOP
      dockerfile: compose/transfer/Dockerfile
    container_name: garage-transfer
    environment:
      GARAGE_WORKSPACE_ROOT: /workspace
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - python
        - -c
        - import urllib.request; r=urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:3033/healthz', timeout=3); raise SystemExit(0 if r.status == 200 else 1)
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 10s
    image: oh-shop/transfer:0.1.0
    networks:
      garage-internal: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        host_ip: 127.0.0.1
        target: 3033
        published: "3033"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/pobox
        target: /workspace/pobox
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/ledger/imports
        target: /workspace/ledger/imports
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/ledger/exports
        target: /workspace/ledger/exports
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/projects
        target: /workspace/projects
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/jobs
        target: /workspace/jobs
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /home/dev/OH_SHOP/workspace/shared
        target: /workspace/shared
        bind: {}
networks:
  garage-internal:
    name: compose_garage-internal
    driver: bridge
volumes:
  openwebui_data:
    name: compose_openwebui_data
